pages.text: Combat ranged class. Crafts all the Archers mod ranged kit — composite, crystal, mechanic, and royal bows; heavy and rapid crossbows; flint through aeternium spears; the Archer and Ranger scout armor sets; the auto-fire hook; the quiver; and the Archer spell book.$(br2)Netherite and ruby spear variants stay vanilla smithing-table upgrades from the bases.
